text.message: We’re gonna have to pillage their villages
I was feeling better until my starting brick got stolen
7s should like not be allowed first round, getting starting road robbed can be a killer
Kind of…I got lucky and 11 rolled again but still need another now to settle
Starting on like a 10-9-2 with 2 tree and 5e tree gets robbed….the worst
Well ur about to take road right?
And have a longer max road than them
Should have blocked their brick would be easier to take road
i’m afraid it probably won’t matter
why you’re saying i’m gonna get road
Ffs I’ll just take it if you’re gonna be a loser about it
